results.description:
Stream your favorite HISTORY TV shows! 

Alone, The Curse of Oak Island, Pawn Stars, Mountain Men, Forged in Fire, American Pickers, to name a few.  

Watch your favorites and discover your next binge from HISTORY’s best-in-class documentary events, industry-leading nonfiction series and premium fact-based scripted programming. 

HISTORY serves as the most trustworthy source of informational entertainment.  
 
With the newly re-designed HISTORY app, you can: 

> Watch full episodes and clips 
> Catch up on entire seasons of new and classic shows 
> See exclusive clips and deleted scenes, never shown before on television 
> Create a profile with HISTORY TV so you can continue watching episodes whenever you want, on any device  

POPULAR SHOWS ON HISTORY 
Alone 
Pawn Stars 
Colosseum 
After Jackie 
The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch 
The Booze, Bets and Sex That Built America 
Lost Gold of the Aztecs 
American Pickers’ Ancient Aliens 
Black Patriots: Heroes of the Civil War 
Food That Built America 
Forged in Fire 
History’s Great Escapes with Morgan Freeman 
History’s Greatest Mysteries 
I Was There 
Modern Marvels 
Mountain Men 
The Curse of Oak Island 
The UnXplained 
Toys That Built America 

...and so much more! 

The HISTORY app is free to use. If your TV Provider is supported, you can sign in and get access to even more content. 

This app features Nielsen’s proprietary measurement software which will allow you to contribute to market research, like Nielsen’s TV Ratings. For more information, please visit: 
http://www.nielsen.com/digitalprivacy 

HISTORY content is only available to stream in the United States.

results.releaseNotes: We fixed some bugs and made some updates. We hope you enjoy a better streaming experience.
results.description:
Now with over 2,000 videos – HISTORY Channel brings you thousands of documentaries and specials exploring the events and people that shaped our world, from ancient empires to modern warfare, all commercial-free.

Watch commercial-free, full-length videos with no TV provider needed.

New videos are added weekly, featuring everything from ancient civilizations and World Wars to space exploration. Plus your favorite classic HISTORY Channel series. Watch:

•       America: The Story of Us

•       Days That Shaped America

•       The Men Who Built America

•       Founding Fathers

•       Ice Road Truckers

And many more!

Note: HISTORY Vault content is only available to stream in the United States. Free Trial is only valid for first-time subscribers. Video can only be streamed in the U.S. and U.S. Territories.

Payment is charged to the iTunes account at confirmation of purchase. Your account will be charged for renewal at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. You can manage your subscription and auto-renewal by visiting Account Settings on your device. If you turn off auto-renew during the current subscription period, your subscription will be canceled for the subsequent period.

 
Please visit support.historyvault.com if you are experiencing any issues.

Terms of Use: http://www.aenetworks.com/terms

Privacy Policy: http://www.aenetworks.com/privacy

results.releaseNotes: This release comes with the usual bug fixes you’ve come to expect, but also some performance improvements we know you’ll love. Enjoy streaming at its best by keeping your app up to date.
results.description:
discovery+ is the streaming home of Food, Home, Travel, True Crime, Paranormal and so much more. Watch exciting, can’t miss Original series plus all your favorite shows from the best TV brands. There's something for everyone!

Here's what else discovery+ offers you:
• Enjoy all your favorites from the best TV brands including: HGTV, Food Network, TLC, ID, Animal Planet, Travel Channel, Discovery Channel and more. Channel availability varies by region.
• Must-see 90 Day Fiancé series and other incredible reality moments.
• Award-winning collection of the best natural history series and breath-taking documentaries.
• An ever-growing catalog of new TV series and episodes.
• Full access to watch anytime, anywhere across compatible devices.
• Browse or search with ease across the best in: Lifestyle, True Crime, Adventure, Home, Food, Paranormal, Relationships, Reality, Nature & Animals, Science & Technology, and more.
• Cast from your mobile or tablet device to the big screen with Chromecast and Airplay.
• Download your discovery+ favorites so you can watch on-the-go (only available to Ad-Free subscribers in the US).
• Jump back into your favorite show with Continue Watching or save an episode to watch later with My List.

Content and feature availability on discovery+ may vary by region. Some titles and features shown above may not be available in your country. Language availability varies by country.

Your subscription will automatically renew at the then-current price of your plan unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the renewal. Your App Store account will automatically be charged at the same price for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current subscription period. You can manage or cancel your subscription by visiting the App Store or Subscriptions under Settings on your Apple device after purchase. Purposes disclosed in the App Privacy label may vary based on features or services that may not be available in all regions. Discovery+ is only available in certain territories.
 
Terms of Use: https://www.discoveryplus.com/terms-of-use

results.description:
Get the PBS app and stream heartwarming shows like All Creatures Great & Small and Call the Midwife, plus new documentary series like Ken Burns’ American Buffalo. The PBS app features the latest news, live TV from your local PBS station, award-winning documentaries, and iconic series. Download the PBS app and stream thousands of full-length episodes anytime, anywhere! 

Streaming and watching TV is made easy with the PBS app. Watch series you love and discover brand new shows, live or on demand, with PBS’s streaming app available on your mobile phone, tablet, or Smart TV. 

Unlike conventional streaming apps, PBS lets you access local TV live! Stream local content with the PBS app livestream and discover your favorite local PBS station shows. 

Stay up to date with the latest news; watching shows like Frontline, PBS NewsHour, and Washington Week. Catch up on your favorite British dramas with Masterpiece classics including complete seasons of Miss Scarlet & the Duke, World on Fire, Endeavour, and Sanditon. Learn about history and science with new episodes of Finding Your Roots, Antiques Roadshow, Nature, and NOVA. Discover exciting musical performances watching Great Performances and Austin City Limits. You never have to miss a show with brand new videos and episodes added daily to the PBS app. 

WHAT DO YOU GET WITH THE FREE PBS APP? 

STREAM LOCAL & LIVE TV
- Connect to your local PBS station and watch your local station livestream 
- Tune in to the latest from your local community on the PBS app
- Stream your local station TV channel live anytime 

WATCH TV SHOWS ON DEMAND
- Watch TV shows on demand with the PBS app 
- TV shows of all genres - from drama and romance to murder and mystery
- Watch a new series and your all-time favorites
- Save episodes of your favorite TV shows to a custom watchlist

STREAM A VARIETY OF CONTENT
- Watch a new TV show or explore videos from the PBS archives
- Stream specially curated playlists, short films, interviews, extras, and more
- Binge TV shows of all genres on the PBS app
- Watch films, documentaries and TV shows

WATCH TV SERIES ACROSS MULTIPLE GENRES
- Enjoy the best of streaming and entertainment with PBS 
- Drama: All Creatures Great and Small, Miss Scarlet and the Duke, Broadchurch, Poldark, Vienna Blood, Grantchester, Sanditon, World on Fire, Call the Midwife, Jamestown, and more.
- Foreign Language Dramas: Professor T, Seaside Hotel, The Paris Murders, Luna and Sophie, and Sisi: Austrian Empress
- News & Public Affairs: Programs from PBS NewsHour, Frontline, Amanpour and Company, Firing Line, and Washington Week.
- Award-Winning Films & Documentaries: Discover new perspectives with Ken Burns, Independent Lens, POV,, and the PBS Short Film Festival.
- History: Antiques Roadshow, American Experience, American Masters, Finding Your Roots, and more.
- Arts & Performances: Great Performances, Austin City Limits, Bob Ross: The Joy of Painting, and Variety Studio: Actors on Acting.
- Science & Nature: Explore astonishing new worlds from NOVA, Nature, Deep Look, Expedition, and more.

WATCH MORE WITH PBS PASSPORT
Passport is an added benefit of station membership. By donating to your local PBS station you can:
- Stream an expanded library of acclaimed PBS programming
- Extended and exclusive access to 1,500+ episodes of your favorite shows
- Watch past and current seasons of popular shows like All Creatures Great and Small, Endeavour, and Sanditon
- Binge watch new TV series and your favorite PBS programs, like Finding Your Roots
- Stream early releases and special collections, like Ken Burns films and Antiques Roadshow

WHAT’S NEW ON PBS
MASTERPIECE: Moonflower Murders
Blake Edwards: A Love Story in 24 Frames
Big Cats 24/7
NOVA: Dog Tales
MASTERPIECE: Van der Valk S4
Finding Your Roots

Watch TV anywhere and stream PBS shows today.

PBS offers all Americans the opportunity to explore new worlds through trusted, educational television and digital content.

Chronological events which happened on this day in history. These events come from various sources in various languages which you can select. 
You can browse all events of today using the arrows buttons. 
If you are interested in further information regarding a particular event, simply tap on the text and you get related links for that event.
There are many sources for events from all over the world in many different languages. Choose all you are interested in.
